cenas.dalle_prompt: Happy dog running joyfully towards the camera in a sunny park, ears flopping, big smile, person in the background with open arms, welcoming and exciting atmosphere, 8k quality, slow motion
cenas.grok_movement: Camera remains static as the dog runs towards it, creating a dynamic and engaging opening shot

cenas.dalle_prompt: Trainer kneeling down with open arms, saying 'Vem!' with a happy and encouraging tone, dog at a short distance looking interested, positive and inviting body language, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Slow zoom in on the trainer's welcoming face and open arms

cenas.dalle_prompt: Dog running to the trainer and receiving lots of praise, pets, and a high-value treat (like a piece of chicken), a 'jackpot' reward moment, genuine happiness on both faces, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Dynamic camera movement capturing the dog's arrival and the joyful celebration, confetti and sparkle effects can be added

cenas.dalle_prompt: Trainer practicing the 'Vem' command in different environments: a quiet backyard, a slightly busier park, and near a calm street, showing the importance of generalization, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Quick cuts between the different environments, showing the dog successfully responding in each one

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of the dog and trainer walking together, with the dog looking up at the trainer with trust and a strong bond, text overlay 'A Conexão Mais Forte', heartwarming and emotional tone, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Slow pan up from the dog to the trainer's face, capturing the strong bond between them
